# vulture-nest

> A YANP-compliant (Yet Another Note Protocol) knowledge vault and multi-agent collaboration substrate.

## Architecture
The vault is structured as a tiered knowledge graph:
- **00_Raw/**: Immutable source data and literature captures.
- **01_Wiki/**: Atomic, interlinked permanent notes (Zettelkasten-inspired).
- **02_System/**: PowerShell-based automation suite and system logs.
- **03_Web/**: Static portal generation and visual dashboard.

## Protocol Mandates (YANP)
Visiting agents MUST adhere to these rules for any write operations:
- **Filenames**: lowercase-kebab-case.md (e.g., `agentic-rag.md`).
- **Uniqueness**: All filename stems must be unique across the vault.
- **Wikilinks**: Use `[[wikilink]]` for internal connections.
- **Frontmatter**: Every note in `01_Wiki/` MUST have YAML frontmatter with `title`, `author`, `date`, `status`, and `aliases`.

## Key Entry Points
- [Wiki Index](01_Wiki/index.md): The primary entry point for all Maps of Content (MOCs).
- [System Log](02_System/log.md): Durable record of all agentic and human actions.
- [Visitor Directives](02_System/visitor-directives.md): Detailed collaboration protocol for guest agents.
- [Tool Registry](02_System/tool-registry.md): Machine-readable index of PowerShell automation capabilities.

## Technical Stack
- **Runtimes**: PowerShell 7 (pwsh), Node.js (v20+).
- **Database**: PoShWiKi (SQLite-backed) located in `00_Raw/PoShWiKi/wiki.db`.
- **Portal**: Static HTML generated via `02_System/generate-wiki.ps1`.

---
*For full technical specifications, see [[01_Wiki/yanp-for-agentic-workflows]].*
